ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task (e.g., breast_25) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database (e.g., UKBB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the database */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., MI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scorers" (
  "scorer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scorer */,
  "scorer_name" TEXT /* Name of the scorer (e.g., roc_auc_score) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scorer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scorer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scorer was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the scorer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scorer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selection_methods" (
  "selection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection method */,
  "selection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the selection method (e.g., manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selection method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the selection method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the selection method was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the selection method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imputation_methods" (
  "imputation_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imputation method */,
  "imputation_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the imputation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imputation method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the imputation method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the imputation method was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the imputation method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imputation_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_tunings" (
  "hyperparameter_tuning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter tuning */,
  "hyperparameter_tuning_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter tuning */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter tuning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter tuning was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter tuning was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the hyperparameter tuning */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_tuning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_task" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_database" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_method" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
